# Digital Credit Yield

> Independent tracker for STRC, SATA and BMNP — high-yield preferred stocks paying up to 13% annually. Live prices, dividend history, income projectors, and capital flow data. For information purposes only. Not financial advice.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/): Overview of STRC, SATA and BMNP with live prices and current yields.
- [STRC Hub](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc): Full hub for STRC (Strategy Inc Perpetual Preferred Stock, 11.50% annualised yield).
- [SATA Hub](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata): Full hub for SATA (Strive Preferred Equity Instrument, 13.00% annualised yield).
- [BMNP Hub](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/bmnp): Full hub for BMNP (Bitmine Immersion Technologies Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock, 9.50% annualised yield).
- [Money Flow](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/money-flow): Weekly capital raised by STRC, SATA and BMNP from SEC 8-K filings since each IPO.
- [Blog](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog): Articles on STRC, SATA, BMNP, preferred stock investing, and dividend strategies.

## STRC Tools

- [STRC Live Chart](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc/chart): Live price chart for STRC.
- [STRC Dividend History](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc/dividends): Historical dividend payments for STRC.
- [STRC Growth Projector](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc/projector): Project income and portfolio growth from STRC dividends.
- [STRC Differentiator](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc/differentiator): Compare STRC against other income assets.

## SATA Tools

- [SATA Live Chart](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata/chart): Live price chart for SATA.
- [SATA Dividend History](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata/dividends): Historical dividend payments for SATA.
- [SATA Growth Projector](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata/projector): Project income and portfolio growth from SATA dividends.
- [SATA Differentiator](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata/differentiator): Compare SATA against other income assets.

## BMNP Tools

- [BMNP Live Chart](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/bmnp/chart): Live price chart for BMNP.
- [BMNP Dividend History](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/bmnp/dividends): Historical dividend payments for BMNP.
- [BMNP Growth Projector](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/bmnp/projector): Project income and portfolio growth from BMNP dividends.
- [BMNP Differentiator](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/bmnp/differentiator): Compare BMNP against other income assets.
